summary: The user is seeking recommendations for waterproof hiking boots suitable for multi-day backpacking trips, specifically the Merrell Moab 2 Mid Waterproof, after a recent solo camping trip to Big Sur. They are also planning a 10-day trek in New Zealand and are looking for lightweight cooking and water purification solutions for their adventure.
facts: The user recently returned from a 3-day solo camping trip to Big Sur in early April. The user is planning a 10-day trek in New Zealand in November, which will involve hiking on varying terrain, including rocky trails. The user is considering bringing a portable stove and cooking pot for meal preparation during their trek. The user is interested in lightweight and compact stoves that can withstand windy conditions. The user is thinking of bringing a water filter instead of purification tablets for their trek. The user is considering the Sawyer Mini Water Filter for their 10-day trek. The Merrell Moab 2 Mid Waterproof is known for its performance on rocky and uneven terrain. The user has heard great things about the Merrell Moab 2 Mid Waterproof boots.
